Class DRDesignList

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.design.base.component.DRDesignComponent
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.design.base.component.DRDesignList
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIDesignComponent, DRIDesignList, Serializable
public class DRDesignList extends DRDesignComponent implements DRIDesignList

DRDesignList class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
